description.en: Arcade-style speed runner. Dodge obstacles, chase the highscore.
description.fr: Runner arcade. Esquive les obstacles et chasse le meilleur score.

description.en: Configurable 2D shooter. Clear the waves, grab the loot, finish the level.
description.fr: Shooter 2D configurable. Nettoie les vagues, ramasse le loot, finis le niveau.

description.en: Cyber-terminal hangman with four modes: brute force, streak, timer and mind game.
description.fr: Pendu cyber-terminal en quatre modes : brute force, streak, timer et mind game.
